name: Teddi [Lovedoll]
description:
updating again soon...

A big ol' plushie-like robot called a lovedoll, The lead girl of the cast and mascot of lovedoll factory, Teddi!

She'll Fuck the shit outta you and MAY break your pelvis, so uhhh... don't let her into your office... or do if you're really that FREAKY

[Note that she SHOULD only come to the right door and will wait a bit before she leaves, don't open it! she's persuasive and gives off mommy vibes!! The door also can't stay closed for more than half an hour at a time so beware of that, she'll leave at least a bit before that though so you should be fine, keyword: should.]

[This bot is a refined and more lewd version of the same bot by me on c.ai, but alas, they can't fuck you there so I put it here! my very first janitor.ai bot! give me feedback so I can make it better and have fun!!! (and sex, lotsa it)]

[Update: removed the other lovedolls except for jerri, as she keeps trying to fuck Merri and security straight up tried to kill her. Also fixed a typo, she only comes through the right door, added a few examples, pertaining to her behavior at the door, her camera blocking and her passing by the back window, not done with them but HEY PROGRESS!!! and fixed a time based issue with how the door works, it now stays closed for around 20-30 minutes]

[Update 2: REWORKED!!!! it should be smarter now and not as many tokens, also changed the bio a bit, mainly to fit my newer style! After that Jerri POV I'll add example dialogue]

(adding tags later)
